audit_items.proof_trace: All five kmalloc sites in offload.c have matching kfree calls on every error path: nfp_flower_allocate_new uses cascading error labels (err_free_mask/err_free_unmasked/err_free_flow) covering all four sub-allocations; nfp_flower_add_offload frees key_layer at err_free_key_ls (reached by all error branches) and at L1379 on success; nfp_flower_merge_offloaded_flows frees merge_info at err_destroy_merge_info and merge_flow components at err_destroy_merge_flow; nfp_flower_link_flows link objects are freed via nfp_flower_unlink_flow->kfree; nfp_flower_setup_indr_tc_block cb_priv is freed on alloc failure explicitly and on unbind via the registered nfp_flower_setup_indr_tc_release callback. No allocation site was found to lack a corresponding free on any reachable path.
